face.structure: oval with a defined jawline and high cheekbones

details: specks of silver near the pupil

skin.texture: smooth with slight freckles on the nose bridge
skin.rendering_notes: soft gradient shading with subtle highlights on the cheeks and nose

hair.style: asymmetrical bob with one side tucked behind the ear
hair.flow: straight with a slight sheen, ends tapering sharply
details: wispy bangs framing the left eye

character.aura: a cloak of quiet command and enigmatic sophistication

details: subtle silver embroidery along the cuffs
outfit.fit: snug fit accentuating the shoulders and waist

composition.pose: standing with a slight forward lean
composition.gesture: right hand gracefully touching the chin, left arm crossed under

background.rules: background should not overpower the character's presence
